ssc-higher-math-ch11-set10-q06.explanation: d=√[(9−3)²+(7−-1)²]=√100=10। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set10-q07.explanation: m=(y₂−y₁)/(x₂−x₁)=(1−0)/(2−0)=1/2। — Slope নির্ণয় previous-year pattern-এ গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set10-q08.explanation: মধ্যবিন্দু=((1+7)/2, (2+4)/2)=(4, 3)। — Midpoint formula board-standard short calculation। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set10-q09.explanation: d=√[(3−0)²+(4−0)²]=√25=5। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set10-q11.explanation: মধ্যবিন্দু=((2+4)/2, (2+6)/2)=(3, 4)। — Midpoint formula board-standard short calculation। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set10-q12.explanation: d=√[(5−1)²+(1−-2)²]=√25=5। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set10-q15.explanation: d=√[(7−2)²+(11−-1)²]=√169=13। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set10-q18.explanation: d=√[(9−3)²+(8−0)²]=√100=10। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।
